name: Cédric O
headline: Co-founder of Mistral AI, Former French Secretary of State for Digital Affairs
bio: Prominent figure in the French tech ecosystem, now leading one of Europe's most significant AI ventures, Mistral AI.

name: Dr. Andréa Martin
headline: AI in Healthcare Specialist, Researcher at Charité Berlin
bio: Leading research on the application of machine learning for diagnostic imaging and personalized medicine.

name: Jürgen Schmidhuber
headline: Scientific Director at IDSIA, 'Father of modern AI'
bio: Pioneering researcher in the field of artificial neural networks, particularly LSTMs, which are crucial for modern NLP.
